title: gilia androsacea
intro: Gilia androsacea, also known as sky pilot, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. It is a member of the figwort family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Gilia androsacea, including teas and infusions, have been used to alleviate symptoms and support overall health.
